title: FORA Tenant Policy
description: Per-tenant IAM policy (FORA-125 / 0.7.3). Narrows the platform role registry; never widens it.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped only on a breaking shape change.

description.description: Free-form human-readable description of the policy.

mcp_grants.description: Per-role, per-MCP positive grant list. The platform default is deny; a grant here authorises the role to call the MCP for this tenant.

additionalProperties.description: true grants the MCP to the role; false is a redundant no-op (use `deny` instead).

scope_overrides.description: Per-role scope narrowing. A scope listed here MUST already be in the role's `scopes` in roles.yaml; the tenant can drop a scope but never add a new one.

deny.description: Tenant-wide deny list. Any MCP listed here is denied to every role, even if the role is otherwise allowed by the platform registry and a per-role grant.
